title: Leonardo DiCaprio, Emma Stone and ‘Hamnet’ Win at Irish Film and TV Awards With Indie Drama ‘Christy’ Taking Top Prize
content:
ByClayton Davis

Senior Awards Editor

Leonardo DiCaprio,Emma Stoneand the independent Irish drama “Christy” were among the winners at the 2026 Irish Film and Television Awards, announced in Dublin on Friday.

The Brendan Canty-directed “Christy” (not to be confused with the Sydney Sweeney boxing drama of the same name) entered the night as the top-nominated title with 14 mentions and delivered in key races, winning best film, director and casting, along with editing and a supporting actor prize for Jamie Forde. The film follows a young man seeking independence after leaving the foster system.

Elsewhere in the film categories, “Hamnet” notched wins for best international film, lead actress for Oscar frontrunner Jessie Buckley, supporting actor for Paul Mescal and script for Maggie O’Farrell and Chloé Zhao. Other Oscar hopefuls that received notices in the international lead acting races ahead of Sunday’s BAFTA ceremony — Leonardo DiCaprio’s work as a former revolutionary in Paul Thomas Anderson’s “One Battle After Another” and Emma Stone, for her work as an executive who may or may not be an alien in Yorgos Lanthimos’ “Bugonia.”

At the same time, Éanna Hardwicke took lead actor for “Saipan” while the double-nominated Kerry Condon prevailed with a supporting actress prize for Joseph Kosinski’s “F1.”

On the television side, “Blue Lights” won best TV drama, while Ailbhe Keogan won script for “Trespasses.” Anthony Boyle took lead actor in drama for “House of Guinness,” and Lola Petticrew won lead actress for “Trespasses.” Chris Walley won supporting actor for “The Young Offenders,” and Alison Oliver was named supporting actress for “Task.” Louisa Harland won the Rising Star Award.

“Christy” and “Saipan” led the nominations heading into the ceremony, with “Saipan” earning 12. The ceremony also marked a record number of women nominated in directing categories, with seven across film and TV.

This year, Ciarán Hinds is set to receive the Lifetime Achievement Award.

The list of winners is below.

title_zh: 萊昂納多·迪卡普里奧(Leonardo DiCaprio)、艾瑪·史東(Emma Stone)和《哈姆奈特》(Hamnet)在愛爾蘭電影與電視獎中獲獎，獨立劇情片《克里斯蒂》(Christy)榮獲最高獎項。
content_zh:
由克雷頓·戴維斯(Clayton Davis)報導

高級獎項編輯

李奧納多·迪卡普里奧(Leonardo DiCaprio)、艾瑪·史東(Emma Stone)以及獨立愛爾蘭劇情片《克里斯蒂》(Christy) 是在2026年愛爾蘭電影與電視獎中獲獎的作品，該獎項於週五在都柏林宣布。

由布蘭登·坎提(Brendan Canty)執導的《克里斯蒂》(Christy)（不要與悉尼·史威尼(Sydney Sweeney)的同名拳擊劇混淆）以14項提名進入頒獎典禮，並在關鍵競賽中表現出色，獲得最佳影片、最佳導演和最佳演員陣容獎，還有最佳剪輯和最佳男配角獎，頒給了傑米·福德(Jamie Forde)。該片講述了一名年輕人在離開寄養系統後尋求獨立的故事。

在其他電影類別中，《哈姆奈特》(Hamnet) 獲得最佳國際影片、最佳女主角（奧斯卡熱門人選）傑西·巴克利(Jessie Buckley)、最佳男配角保羅·梅斯卡爾(Paul Mescal)以及最佳劇本獎，頒給了瑪吉·奧法瑞爾(Maggie O’Farrell)和趙婷(Chloé Zhao)。其他奧斯卡希望者在即將到來的星期日BAFTA頒獎典禮前，獲得了國際男演員類別的提名，包括李奧納多·迪卡普里奧在保羅·托馬斯·安德森(Paul Thomas Anderson)的《一場又一場的戰鬥》(One Battle After Another)中的表現，以及艾瑪·史東在約戈斯·蘭西莫斯(Yorgos Lanthimos)的《巴戈尼亞》(Bugonia)中飾演的可能是外星人的高管角色。

同時，艾納·哈德維克(Éanna Hardwicke)獲得《塞班島》(Saipan)的最佳男主角，而雙提名的凱瑞·康登(Kerry Condon)則憑借約瑟夫·科辛斯基(Joseph Kosinski)的《F1》獲得最佳女配角獎。

在電視方面，《藍燈》(Blue Lights) 獲得最佳電視劇，而艾爾比·基奧根(Ailbhe Keogan)則憑《侵入者》(Trespasses)獲得最佳劇本獎。安東尼·博伊爾(Anthony Boyle)在《吉尼斯之家》(House of Guinness)中獲得最佳男主角，洛拉·佩蒂克魯(Lola Petticrew)則憑《侵入者》(Trespasses)獲得最佳女主角。克里斯·瓦利(Chris Walley)獲得《年輕的罪犯》(The Young Offenders)的最佳男配角，艾莉森·奧利弗(Alison Oliver)則被評選為《任務》(Task)的最佳女配角。路易莎·哈蘭(Louisa Harland)獲得新星獎。

《克里斯蒂》(Christy)和《塞班島》(Saipan)在頒獎典禮前領跑提名，《塞班島》獲得12項提名。此次頒獎典禮也創下了導演類別中女性提名人數的紀錄，共有七位女性參與電影和電視的提名。

今年，基亞蘭·海因茲(Ciarán Hinds)將獲得終身成就獎。

以下是獲獎名單。
